summary: Mission v10.2 - Format 16:9 & Zéro Vide - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) CSS cover technique for iframes (transform translate -50%, min-width/height, width 177.78vh), (2) paddingTop 0px for zéro vide noir, (3) 3 icônes header alignées gap 16px, (4) Scroll permet d'accéder aux sessions Afroboost Silent, (5) Boutons Like/Réserver fonctionnels, (6) Profile overlay visible.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ PartnersCarousel.js L202: paddingTop 0px - VERIFIED in code and UI
✅ PartnersCarousel.js L212-233: CSS cover technique for iframes - VERIFIED
✅ Iframe style: position absolute, top 50%, left 50%, width 177.78vh, height 100vh, min-width 100%, min-height 56.25vw, transform translate(-50%, -50%)
✅ PartnersCarousel.js L712: gap-4 for header icons - VERIFIED 16px gaps
✅ Sessions accessible via scroll - 8 date slots visible (4 Session Cardio + 4 Sunday Vibes)
✅ Like button toggle works (fill changes from 'none' to 'currentColor')
✅ Profile overlay visible with Photo + Nom + Bio

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All visual and functional tests passed via Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission v10.2 validated: CSS cover technique for YouTube/Vimeo iframes (translate -50%, min-width/height), paddingTop 0px, header icons gap 16px. Sessions Afroboost Silent accessible via scroll with 8 date slots.

CSS_COVER_TECHNIQUE.comment: 16:9 videos fill entire space with CSS cover technique
